---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Request / 功能请求

### Use Case / 使用场景

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? / 你想解决什么问题？ -->

### Desired Feature / 期望功能

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like to see. / 描述你希望看到的功能。 -->

### Alternatives Considered / 替代方案

<!-- Have you tried any workarounds or alternatives? / 你尝试过哪些替代方案？ -->

### Additional Context / 额外上下文

<!-- Any other information, mockups, or references. / 其他信息、草图或参考资料。 -->
